patch.description:
Used for Reconciling orders with exchange errors.  Valid fields to update for SOR orders with an error state are exchange_order_id and exchange_error_ack.  Other Fields may not be updated.

 In Order to continue routing the quantity of a failed SOR order, set exchange_order_id to the Exchange Order ID if the order was routed, or to empty / false if the order didn't hit the book.  In the case of

 an empty / false exchange_order ID, executed quantity and net / gross consideration will be set to 0, and set exchange_error_ack to true.  Example for errored order that didn't execute:

{"exchage_order_id": "", "exchange_error_ack":true}

confirmed_at.title: Confirmed at
confirmed_at.description: When was this Order Confirmed by the network

task_updated_at.title: Task updated at
task_updated_at.description: When was the order last updated by the Order task?  If older than 30 seconds, order may be crashed.

gross_consideration.title: Gross consideration
gross_consideration.description: Exchange executed cost, or calculated from trades

has_open_child_orders.title: Has open child orders
has_open_child_orders.description: Does this order have open SOR orders or unacknowleged error SOR orders?.

net_executed_quantity.title: Net executed quantity
net_executed_quantity.description: Sum of (Executed quantity - / + fees for Buy / sell order if fees in target currency.  Otherwise equal to executed qty) for all SOR orders

task_id.title: Task id
task_id.description: Task ID set by the backend system.

parent_order_slug.title: Parent order slug
parent_order_slug.description: URL Safe slug of optional grand parent order

sequence.title: Sequence
sequence.description: CoinRoutes sequence number that is scoped per strategy and object type.

stop_triggered.title: Stop triggered
stop_triggered.description: has this stop loss order been triggered

order_status.title: Order status
order_status.description: Order status **can only be sent as 'open' to send an order directly into the market or 'staged'** to require manual approval from a trader.  The other status may be returned on GET, but cannot be set by the user directly.

aggression.title: Aggression
aggression.description:
**MAKER ONLY**
 - **Passive**: Sets the target price at 25% of the spread towards the more aggressive price of the weighted CONSOLIDATED order book.
- **Neutral**: Sets the target price at the midpoint (50%) of the weighted CONSOLIDATED order book.
Note: Orders can be Taker if “Sweep to” is set to Target or Cheaper. In constrained algos (TWAP, Scheduled Post, POV, and TimePace), Passive and Neutral can still send IOC orders at the end of the interval.

**MAKER AND TAKER**
- **Aggressive**: Sets the target price 75% of the spread towards the more aggressive price of the weighted CONSOLIDATED order book.
- **Near Peg**: Pegs to the top of book(best bid for a buy / best offer for a sell) on a specific exchange. If you select 5 different exchanges in the “exchange” field, orders have 5 different prices.
- **Midpoint Peg**: Pegs to the midpoint on a specific exchange. If you select 5 different exchanges in the “exchange” field, orders can have 5 different prices.
- **Far Peg**: Pegs to one increment below the best ask for a buy, creating a new best bid. Pegs to one increment above the best bid for sell, creating a new best ask. If you select 5 different exchanges in the “exchange” field, orders can have 5 different prices.
- **Auto**: Adjusts the aggression level of the order over the course of the interval. The order starts out as Neutral for each interval.Halfway through the interval time, if less than 60% of the interval quantity is executed, the aggression level switches to Aggressive. At 90% of the interval, if less than 90% has filled, the aggression changes to Market Peg.

move_percentage.title: Move percentage
move_percentage.description: **Smart Post only.**  A number expressed in percent that determines when new orders will be sent if old ones are unfilled. Will be set automatically if null.

max_post_size.title: Max post size
max_post_size.description: Max size to post for a single order posted to an exchange.  Defaults to an algorithmically determined value.

is_twap.title: Is twap
is_twap.description: **Smart Post only** If "true", the order will be proportionately traded over the entire time period selected and will not be allowed to finish before the final interval.

end_time.title: End time
end_time.description: **Smart Post Only** If specified, will trade based on a schedule for the time period.  If TWAP is not selected, it will try to complete the order as soon as it can using Smart Post logic, but will ensure it stays on schedule with sweep orders every interval if it falls behind.

interval_length.title: Interval length
interval_length.description: Deprecated: use interval_sec. **Smart Post only** Based in minutes, this controls how granular in time the algo keeps to its schedule.  Only valid if end_time is set.

tolerance_pct.title: Tolerance pct
tolerance_pct.description: **Smart Post Only** The percentage that is used to determine how far ahead or behind schedule the algorithm will be allowed.

sweep_pct.title: Sweep pct
sweep_pct.description: **Smart Post Only** The max percent that single sweep can go past the CBBO for a goal or TWAP order.

reprice_seconds.title: Reprice seconds
reprice_seconds.description: **Smart Post Only** Amount of time that, from the time the SOR sends an order to an exchange, the system will monitor and, if the SOR order is not executed, will reprice that order at the end of the time interval.

reprice_randomization_pct.title: Reprice randomization pct
reprice_randomization_pct.description: **Smart Post Only** Used to modify the actual time that the system will use to reprice to avoid predictability.

exchanges.description: String names of exchanges to trade on.  EX: ["poloniex","gdax"]

market_data_exchanges.description: Smart Post Only.  String names of exchanges to use for market data.  EX: ["poloniex","gdax"]

client_order_id.title: Client order id
client_order_id.description: Optional UUID to use for client order ID.  Automatically generated if ommited.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: Strategy to use for order.  Exchange Accounts from selected strategy will be used.

post_exchange_count.title: Post exchange count
post_exchange_count.description: *Smart Post Only*  The number of exchanges to post on in a single round of routing. Use the default value of zero to allow the algo to calibrate this parameter.

max_order_count.title: Max order count
max_order_count.description: Number of resting orders from previous price updates to leave on exchange orderbooks. Use the default value of zero to allow the algo to calibrate this parameter.

parent_order.title: Parent order
parent_order.description: Optional client_order_id of grand parent order.

stop_price.title: Stop price
stop_price.description: **Smart Stop Only.** Price to trigger the stop order at. A buy/sell order will trigger once price is above/below the stop price

end_offset.title: End offset
end_offset.description: **TWAP, Scheduled Post, & Time Pace Only** If specified will generate end_time based on time of order creation.  Takes priority over end_time selection

quantity_currency.title: Quantity currency
quantity_currency.description: **Sweep only**   Specifies which currency the order is priced in.  Can be either the funding or target currency.  Will automatically populate use_funding_currency.

sweep_to.title: Sweep to
sweep_to.description:
**Smart Post & Time Based Algos Only**
 - **Disabled**: Passive and Neutral aggressions will never send IOC (Taker) orders and instead will send POST (Maker) orders only. Other aggression levels will behave as normal.
- **Cheaper**: Route orders to liquidity provider if the price is cheaper than on exchange (net of fees).
- **Target**: The algo will send an IOC (Taker) order to the exchange/liquidity provider when a price (net of fees) is available on exchange/liquidity provider that is better than our internally calculated target price.

volume_constraint_pct.title: Volume constraint pct
volume_constraint_pct.description: The amount in % that the algo will constrain the orders based upon

volume_constraint_interval_secs.title: Volume constraint interval secs
volume_constraint_interval_secs.description: The amount of trailing time in seconds that the algorithm will use to calculate the constraint

volume_constraint_max_post_size.title: Volume constraint max post size
volume_constraint_max_post_size.description: **Percent of Volume constrained only** If "true", the order will have a max post size is equal to the average trade size aggregated across exchanges

min_post_size.title: Min post size
min_post_size.description: Min size to post for a single order posted to an exchange.

cade_algo_version.title: Cade algo version
cade_algo_version.description: Algo version for the chosen algo. Will default the the algos default version if unspecified

contra_exchanges.description: Spread and Pairs Only.  String names of exchanges to use for contra product.  EX: ["poloniex","gdax"]

anchor_spread_threshold_pct.title: Anchor spread threshold pct
anchor_spread_threshold_pct.description: Percentage value that specifies when the algorithm should switch from a Maker/Maker to Maker/Taker. Once the spread % becomes greater than the defined threshold percentage, IOC orders will be sent to the contra leg.

contra_reprice_increment_pct.title: Contra reprice increment pct
contra_reprice_increment_pct.description: **Spread & Pairs Only.** The amount of movement of the midpoint price before the algorithm acts to reprice the orders previously sent on the contra side.

market_spread.title: Market spread
market_spread.description: Enables two pairs to execute dollar-neutral trading for the entire duration of the order.

spread_offset_pct.title: Spread offset pct
spread_offset_pct.description: **Spread Only.** Target spread for the algo to capture. A positive value instructs the algorithm to place the anchor quote to earn at least this much profit. A negative value instructs the algorithm it can realize a loss.

spread_offset_value.title: Spread offset value
spread_offset_value.description: **Spread Only.** Target spread for the algo to capture. A positive value instructs the algorithm to place the anchor quote to earn at least this much profit. A negative value instructs the algorithm it can realize a loss.

reprice_increment_pct.title: Reprice increment pct
reprice_increment_pct.description: **Spread & Pairs Only.** The amount of movement of the midpoint price before the algorithm acts to reprice the orders previously sent.

risk_quantity.title: Risk quantity
risk_quantity.description: **Spread & Pairs Only.** The amount of the order quantity that the system will allow to be out of balance. Defaults to 10 percent of order quantity

risk_quantity_notional_usd.title: Risk quantity notional usd
risk_quantity_notional_usd.description: **Spread & Pairs Only.** risk_quantity denomominated in USD

oc_factor.title: Oc factor
oc_factor.description: **Smart Post, POV & Time Based Algos Only.** Can be looked at as a scaler to the defaults table and determines how often we take. Typically either blank (null) or “1”.

lead_mode.title: Lead mode
lead_mode.description: **Spread & Pairs Only.** Which side posts first (anchor/contra).

sweep_trigger_mode.title: Sweep trigger mode
sweep_trigger_mode.description:
**Spread & Pairs Only**
 - **Immediate**: Once the first leg executes, an IOC order is sent for the second leg.
- **Disabled**: Making orders are sent for both the first and second leg of the trade.
- **Threshold**: If the observed spread offset % is between 0 and the Sweep Trigger Threshold % entered, the algo will send an IOC order on the second leg.

sweep_trigger_threshold_pct.title: Sweep trigger threshold pct
sweep_trigger_threshold_pct.description: **Spread Only.** Spread percentage below which the system will revert to sweep behaviour (0.10% = 10 BPS).

balancing_max_post_size.title: Balancing max post size
balancing_max_post_size.description: **Spread & Pairs Only.** Maximum size of the post-only order that the system will send to the exchange.

take_only.title: Take only
take_only.description: This field turns on the ‘sniper’ logic. It utilizes the oppurtunity cost signal to snipe/take at a favorable level when it can.

target_currency.title: Target currency
target_currency.description: **Multi-Product Only.** Specifies target currency of order.

target_currency_pairs.description: **Multi-Product Only.** String names of currency pairs to use. EX: ["SOL-USD","SOL-USDT"]

pause_offset_pct.title: Pause offset pct
pause_offset_pct.description: **Spread Only.** When actual offset is this percentage from set target offset, the algorithm will begin posting orders to the book for the lead leg.

spread_offset_mode.title: Spread offset mode
spread_offset_mode.description: **Spread Only.** Direct mode uses the spread offset percentage directly. Cross rate mode uses the cross rate to calculate the spread offset percentage.

interval_sec.title: Interval sec
interval_sec.description: **Smart Post only** Based in seconds, this controls how granular in time the algo keeps to its schedule. Only valid if end_time is set.

pairs_ratio.title: Pairs ratio
pairs_ratio.description: **Pairs Only.** Ratio of the anchor order to the contra order (anchor product price/contra product price).

pause_offset_ratio.title: Pause offset ratio
pause_offset_ratio.description: **Pairs Only.** Ratio that tells the algorithm that it can start posting orders to the book for the lead leg if the target ratio is not marketable.

bps_offset.title: Bps offset
bps_offset.description: Basis Points Offset. Adjust the limit price on the child orders being sent by the # of bps indicated in this field.

interval_qty.title: Interval qty
interval_qty.description: **Time Pace Only** Amount of the target currency you want to fill on each interval.

balancing_bps_offset.title: Balancing bps offset
balancing_bps_offset.description: **Spread & Pairs Only** Basis Points Offset for Balancing Leg. Adjusts the limit price sent on child orders by the number of bps indicated on the second leg.

latest_interval_weight_pct.title: Latest interval weight pct
latest_interval_weight_pct.description: Latest interval weight pct. For volume constrained algos

full_size.title: Full size
full_size.description: Controls whether or not the full order size is sent on the initial sor order

cancel_time.title: Cancel time
cancel_time.description: CROM will cancel the order at this time if it is still open

gtt_duration.title: Gtt duration
gtt_duration.description: The amount of time in seconds that the order will be good till time

gtt_expiration.title: Gtt expiration
gtt_expiration.description: The time that the order will expire, will take precedence over gtt_duration

pause_offset_value.title: Pause offset value
pause_offset_value.description: **Smart Post Only.** When market mid is this value from set target offset, the algorithm will begin posting/withdrawing orders to the book

pause_offset_unit_qty.title: Pause offset unit qty
pause_offset_unit_qty.description: Smart post pause offset unit quantity

aggression_allocation_pcts.title: Aggression allocation pcts
aggression_allocation_pcts.description: key value pairs to instruct the algo what percentage of the interval should be allocated to each aggression level. Ex: {"passive": "50", "neutral": "25", "aggressive": "25"}

balancing_post_only.title: Balancing post only
balancing_post_only.description: **Spread Only.** If "true", the system will only send post-only orders to the exchange.

disable_ioc_catchup.title: Disable ioc catchup
disable_ioc_catchup.description: This field allows turning off previous interval IOC catchup on interval algos twap/time pace/pov etc. **Note: current interval IOC catchup will still occur**

lead_reduce_only.title: Lead reduce only
lead_reduce_only.description: **Spread Only.** If "true", the system will only send reduce-only orders to the exchange of the lead leg.

price_range.title: Price range
price_range.description: The price range to use for the order in format: [lower_price]_[upper_price] (e.g. '100.5_101.5')

price_range_unit.title: Price range unit
price_range_unit.description: The unit to use for the price range: price - absolute prices, bps - basis points from the mid price at start of order

progression_increment.title: Progression increment
progression_increment.description: Instructs the algo to get incrementally more aggressive on sor order cancels/reprices one progression_increment at a time until a fill has occurred (in which case we reset to 0) or the max limit of 200 progression_increments is reached.

progression_mode.title: Progression mode
progression_mode.description: Instructs the algo to use a linear or exponential increases of progression_increment linear: increment * (1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4) exponential: increment * (1 -> 2 -> 4 -> 8) Ex: progression_increment: 10 progression_mode: exponential -> 10 * 1,2,4,8 (10, 20, 40, 80)

exchanges.description: String names of exchanges to trade on.  EX: ["poloniex","gdax"]

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: Strategy to use for order.  Exchange Accounts from selected strategy will be used.

quantity_currency.title: Quantity currency
quantity_currency.description: **Sweep only**   Specifies which currency the order is priced in.  Can be either the funding or target currency.  Will automatically populate use_funding_currency.

min_qty_incr.title: Min qty incr
min_qty_incr.description: Minimum quantity increment.  Only required if the exchange rejects orders with quantities more precice than this.

confirmed_at.title: Confirmed at
confirmed_at.description: When was this Order Confirmed by the network

task_updated_at.title: Task updated at
task_updated_at.description: When was the order last updated by the Order task?  If older than 30 seconds, order may be crashed.

order_status.title: Order status
order_status.description: Order status **can only be sent as 'open' to send an order directly into the market or 'staged'** to require manual approval from a trader.  The other status may be returned on GET, but cannot be set by the user directly.

gross_consideration.title: Gross consideration
gross_consideration.description: Exchange executed cost, or calculated from trades

move_percentage.title: Move percentage
move_percentage.description: A number expressed in percent that determines when new orders will be sent if old ones are unfilled. Defaults to 20% of the spread.

max_post_size.title: Max post size
max_post_size.description: Max size to post for a single order posted to an exchange.  Defaults to an algorithmically determined value.

min_post_size.title: Min post size
min_post_size.description: Min size to post for a single order posted to an exchange.

is_twap.title: Is twap
is_twap.description: **Smart Post only** If "true", the order will be proportionately traded over the entire time period selected and will not be allowed to finish before the final interval.

end_time.title: End time
end_time.description: **Smart Post Only** If specified, will trade based on a schedule for the time period.  If TWAP is not selected, it will try to complete the order as soon as it can using Smart Post logic, but will ensure it stays on schedule with sweep orders every interval if it falls behind.

interval_length.title: Interval length
interval_length.description: Deprecated: use interval_sec. **Smart Post only** Based in minutes, this controls how granular in time the algo keeps to its schedule.  Only valid if end_time is set.

client_order_id.title: Client order id
client_order_id.description: Optional UUID to use for client order ID.  Automatically generated if ommited.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: Strategy to use for order.  Exchange Accounts from selected strategy will be used.

task_id.title: Task id
task_id.description: Task ID set by the backend system.

post_exchange_count.title: Post exchange count
post_exchange_count.description: *Smart Post Only*  The number of exchanges to post on in a single round of routing. Use the default value of zero to allow the algo to calibrate this parameter.

max_order_count.title: Max order count
max_order_count.description: Number of resting orders from previous price updates to leave on exchange orderbooks. Use the default value of zero to allow the algo to calibrate this parameter.

has_open_child_orders.title: Has open child orders
has_open_child_orders.description: Does this order have open SOR orders or unacknowleged error SOR orders?.

net_executed_quantity.title: Net executed quantity
net_executed_quantity.description: Sum of (Executed quantity - / + fees for Buy / sell order if fees in target currency.  Otherwise equal to executed qty) for all SOR orders

stop_triggered.title: Stop triggered
stop_triggered.description: has this stop loss order been triggered

stop_price.title: Stop price
stop_price.description: **Smart Stop Only.** Price to trigger the stop order at. A buy/sell order will trigger once price is above/below the stop price

public_key.title: Public key
public_key.description: Some exchanges require a public key which must be exposed over API.

shard_id.title: Shard id
shard_id.description: For Polling exchanges, what PID should the poller run on, or which shard group

has_fok.title: Has fok
has_fok.description: Does this venue support Fill Or kill orders?

has_post.title: Has post
has_post.description: Does this venue support posting orders?

non_aggregated_prices.title: Non aggregated prices
non_aggregated_prices.description: In the Case of LPs, are the price levels discrete quantities(True) or can they be aggregated like an order book(False)

public.title: Public
public.description: Is this Counter Party public, or must be enabled by customer

customer_specific.title: Customer specific
customer_specific.description: Does this counterparty provide different prices to different clients.  Only used for non-public Counterparties.

public.title: Public
public.description: Is this Counter Party public, or must be enabled by customer

customer_specific.title: Customer specific
customer_specific.description: Does this counterparty provide different prices to different clients.  Only used for non-public Counterparties.

client_order_id.title: Client order id
client_order_id.description: Optional unique ID to use for client order ID.  Automatically generated if ommited.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: Strategy to use for permissioning access to this order.

slug.title: Slug
slug.description: URL safe representation of the client_order_id.  Will be set automatically based on client order id if ommited

name.title: Name
name.description: Optional name for this order to allow easier lookups.

exchange_error_ack.title: Exchange error ack
exchange_error_ack.description: If there is an exchange error, it must be acknowledged in order to re-submit the quantity of this order

target_price_generated_ts.title: Target price generated ts
target_price_generated_ts.description: Timestamp of market data used to generate target price for this order

oc_taker_maker_diff_bps.title: Oc taker maker diff bps
oc_taker_maker_diff_bps.description: Opportunity cost taker maker difference basis points

order_generated_ts.title: Order generated ts
order_generated_ts.description: Timestamp of market data that generated this order on the Decision Engine

confirmed_at.title: Confirmed at
confirmed_at.description: When was this Order Confirmed by the network

net_consideration.title: Net consideration
net_consideration.description: Exchange executed cost, or calculated from trades plus exchange fees

gross_consideration.title: Gross consideration
gross_consideration.description: Exchange executed cost, or calculated from trades

net_executed_quantity.title: Net executed quantity
net_executed_quantity.description: Executed quantity - / + fees for Buy / sell order if fees in target currency.  Otherwise equal to executed qty

sequence.title: Sequence
sequence.description: CoinRoutes sequence number that is scoped per strategy and object type.

margin_position.title: Margin position
margin_position.description: Used on exchanges that require explicit borrowing for margin trading.

users.description: List of User names that have access to this strategy (and its related exchange accounts)

items.description: List of User names that have access to this strategy (and its related exchange accounts)

resource_kwargs.title: Resource kwargs
resource_kwargs.description: Keyword parameters required for resource initialization

is_approved.title: Is approved
is_approved.description: Is this address approved for withdrawals

memo.title: Memo
memo.description: Memo field if required for blockchain

is_deposit.title: Is deposit
is_deposit.description: Is this a deposit address for a customer wallet, or is it a whitelisted withdrawal address?

is_approved.title: Is approved
is_approved.description: Is this address approved for withdrawals

credit_limit.title: Credit limit
credit_limit.description: Credit limit available for unsettled trades denominated in USD(more currencies coming soon)

credit_used.title: Credit used
credit_used.description: Amount of credit used by the customer.

discretion_bps.title: Discretion bps
discretion_bps.description: Default basis points of discretion in OTC UI

credit_limit_since.title: Credit limit since
credit_limit_since.description: If specified, all balances / credit limits will be zerod out from this timestamp. This can be left blank unless the client has many orders and credit calculations become slow.

discretion_bps.title: Discretion bps
discretion_bps.description: Optional Discretion in Basis points to allow beyond price in limit price.

use_funding_currency.title: Use funding currency
use_funding_currency.description: If True, the quantity specified is in the funding currency.  The default is False, which means the quantity is in target currency.

quantity_currency.title: Quantity currency
quantity_currency.description: Specifies which currency the order is priced in.  Can be either the funding or target currency.

owner.title: Owner
owner.description: Read only trader ID that submitted the order

executed_price.title: Executed price
executed_price.description: Read-only Price trade was executed at

net_consideration.title: Net consideration
net_consideration.description: Read-only cost or proceeds of the order in funding currency

mark_price.title: Mark price
mark_price.description: Price used to calculate credit / balance utilization for open orders without a limit price.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Negative if this is a disbursement made to the customer, or positive for a deposit made by the customer

is_approved.title: Is approved
is_approved.description: Has this settlement been approved?  If no, will not reflect in customer balances.
